# Indian Creek Residences & Yacht Club

9110 W Bay Harbor Dr Bay Harbor Islands FL 33154

Indian Creek Residences & Yacht Club is a pre-construction tower developed by Landau Development. Indian Creek Residences & Yacht Club will feature just 9 exclusive residences with a members-only Yacht Club and Marina. The architect for Indian Creek Residences & Yacht Club is listed as Kobi Karp with Zarifi as the interior designer.

Indian Creek Residences is reimagined with Mimo-Miami Designs throughout the exterior of the development. Modern luxury is scattered throughout the development with lush landscaping by Enea and visual lighting by Ventresca.

Residence features for Indian Creek Residences & Yacht Club include custom Italian kitchens, open floor plans, expansive balconies, and private entrances.

Residents of Indian Creek Residences & Yacht Club will be able to enjoy a luxury pool deck, private marina, yacht club, and additional luxury amenities.

Located at 9110 W Bay Harbor Drive, [Bay Harbor Islands,](https://www.miamicondoinvestments.com/bay-harbor-islands-condos) 33154\. Indian Creek Residences & Yacht Club will be just blocks from shopping, restaurants, and entertainment. By car, Indian Creek Residences & Yacht Club is within 30 minutes of South Beach, Coconut Grove, Wynwood Miami, and the Miami International Airport.
